creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Kryvulia from comment #24)
> When building from ports this will cause the G729 files to be downloaded when G729 option is off. Isn't it?
Yes. Same as for other ports too.
But files are small:
SIZE (asterisk/asterisk-core-sounds-en-g729-1.5.tar.gz) = 1551123
SIZE (asterisk/asterisk-moh-opsound-g729-2.03.tar.gz) = 1103000

> Or if you can provide example of such solution it will be very helpful.
AFAIK ports framework doesn't support other behavior.
